title: Basic JavaScript Symbols

title: Intermediate JavaScript Symbols
description: Create a function that uses Symbol creation and Symbol uniqueness together. Handle edge cases and validate inputs.

title: Advanced JavaScript Symbols Project
description: Build a small application that applies Symbol creation, Symbol uniqueness, Symbol.for and Symbol.keyFor in a real-world scenario. Include error handling and input validation.

description: The following code has bugs related to Symbol creation. Find and fix them.

title: Refactoring JavaScript Symbols
description: Refactor the following code to use modern JavaScript patterns with Symbol creation and Symbol uniqueness.
